auto_deploy_note: Commit and push this bundle to main. The VPS deployer agent watches GitHub main and will include these files in the automated deployment once committed.
suggested_commit_message: fix: stabilize AI fallback and trading worker handoff
change_summary: Clamp Kimi output tokens and normalize Anthropic messages so system prompts are top-level only.
Add regression coverage for Anthropic request normalization.
Load .env in signal-generator-worker before CRON_SECRET checks.
Prevent perpetual-trader-worker from being starved by execution-worker metadata.processed flags.
Add PM2 startup banner for perpetual-trader-worker log capture verification.
Harden support-assistant boss suggestion writes with product update table init, tag validation, failed-write status handling, and bug-report precedence.
Add check-signals diagnostic script with .env loading and required Supabase env validation.
Wire perpetual-trader engine open/close events into trade-history helpers and add API endpoints plus Supabase history schema for dashboard/research analysis.
Add placeholder/static public perpetual trader history page for the new history APIs.
Update deployment/changelog/debugging docs for next-coder and deployer handoff.
deployment_blockers: Schema migration is included: supabase/perpetual-trader-history-schema.sql. Manual SQL approval is required before/with deployment.
Full npm test may fail in the local Codex sandbox with spawn EPERM; run it on VPS or CI after commit.
